headerDisplay: Homebridge plugin for TP-Link Tapo smart devices. Devices are discovered automatically.

email.title: TP-Link Account Email
email.description: The email address used for your TP-Link/Tapo account

password.title: TP-Link Account Password
password.description: The password for your TP-Link/Tapo account

broadcastAddress.title: Broadcast Address
broadcastAddress.description: Network broadcast address for device discovery (e.g., 192.168.1.255)

discoveryTimeout.title: Discovery Timeout (seconds)
discoveryTimeout.description: How long to wait for devices to respond during discovery

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.description: How often to re-discover devices and update state
